{ "name": "zbateson/stream-decorators", "description": "PHP psr7 stream decorators for mime message part streams", "keywords": ["psr7", "stream", "decorators", "mail", "mime", "base64", "quoted-printable", "uuencode", "charset"], "license": "BSD-2-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Zaahid Bateson" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.0", "guzzlehttp/psr7": "^2.5", "zbateson/mb-wrapper": "^2.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.6|^10.0", "friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer": "*", "phpstan/phpstan": "*" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "ZBateson\\StreamDecorators\\": "src/" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "ZBateson\\StreamDecorators\\": "tests/StreamDecorators" } } }
